name: Grilled Anchovies with Christmas Limas, Mint and Chili Oil
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Christmas Lima beans, soaked overnight in 6 cups water
2 Red Jalapenos or Serrano, chopped and seeded
1 Head Frisee lettuce, washed and spun dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the soaked beans, then place them in a 4-quart saucepan with 8 cups water. Bring to a boil.
2. Lower the heat to a high simmer and cook until the beans are tender but still slightly firm to the bite.
3. Drain the beans and let cool. Place the cooled beans in a mixing bowl and add onion, mint, and extra virgin olive oil. Season with salt and pepper; toss to coat and set aside.
4. In a blender, combine the remaining 1/2 cup of oil with chilis, pepper flakes, and capers. Blend until smooth. Transfer to a bottle with a lid and set aside.
5. Preheat the grill.
6. Clean and gut the anchovies, then place them on the hottest part of the grill. Cook through for about 1 minute per side.
7. Meanwhile, add vinegar to the bean mixture and toss to mix. Add Frisee lettuce and stir to coat.
8. Place the grilled fish around the salad on a platter. Serve.
Yield: 4 servings
